Properties.commandText: CREATE DATABASE [EnterpriseApp_Dev];
SELECT 1

CREATE TABLE [Orders] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [CustomerId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [Status] int NOT NULL,
    [TotalAmount] decimal(18,4) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAtUtc] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAtUtc] datetime2 NULL,
    [RowVersion] rowversion NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Orders] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [OutboxMessages] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [Type] nvarchar(500) NOT NULL,
    [Payload] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAtUtc] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [ProcessedAtUtc] datetime2 NULL,
    [ErrorMessage] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [RetryCount] int NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_OutboxMessages] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [Products] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [Name] nvarchar(200) NOT NULL,
    [Description] nvarchar(2000) NOT NULL,
    [Price] decimal(18,4) NOT NULL,
    [StockQuantity] int NOT NULL,
    [IsActive] bit NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAtUtc] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAtUtc] datetime2 NULL,
    [RowVersion] rowversion NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Products] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [RefreshTokens] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [UserId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [TokenHash] nvarchar(128) NOT NULL,
    [ExpiresAtUtc] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [IsRevoked] bit NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAtUtc] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_RefreshTokens] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [OrderItems] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [OrderId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [ProductId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [ProductName] nvarchar(200) NOT NULL,
    [Quantity] int NOT NULL,
    [UnitPrice] decimal(18,4) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAtUtc] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAtUtc] datetime2 NULL,
    [RowVersion] varbinary(max) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_OrderItems] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_OrderItems_Orders_OrderId] FOREIGN KEY ([OrderId]) REFERENCES [Orders] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
CREATE INDEX [IX_OrderItems_OrderId] ON [OrderItems] ([OrderId]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_OutboxMessages_ProcessedAtUtc] ON [OutboxMessages] ([ProcessedAtUtc]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Products_Name] ON [Products] ([Name]);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [IX_RefreshTokens_TokenHash] ON [RefreshTokens] ([TokenHash]);

MessageTemplate: User profile is available. Using '{FullName}' as key repository and Windows DPAPI to encrypt keys at rest.
Application started. Press Ctrl+C to shut down.

Properties.commandText:
SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAtUtc], [o].[ErrorMessage], [o].[Payload], [o].[ProcessedAtUtc], [o].[RetryCount], [o].[Type]
FROM [OutboxMessages] AS [o]
WHERE [o].[ProcessedAtUtc] IS NULL AND [o].[RetryCount] < 5
ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAtUtc]
